course_title: EXPERIMENTAL VIBRATION AND DYNAMIC SYSTEM ANALYSIS
description: Application of digital data acquisition to the investigation of mechanical components, structures and systems using time histories, transforms and response functions to characterize free, forced and transient inputs. Introduction to sensors, instrumentation and methods appropriate for dynamic system response.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (M E 440,E M A 545, or concurrent enrollment) or graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (M E 440,E M A 545, or concurrent enrollment) or graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
